items.name: git-worktrees
items.title: Git Worktrees
items.description: Set up an isolated workspace for feature work so the current branch and working tree stay untouched — detecting existing isolation first, preferring the platform's native worktree tooling, and falling back to git worktrees only when nothing native exists. Use before starting feature work that needs isolation, or before executing an implementation plan.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
